summary: Iteration 15: Frontend-only testing of Platform Toggle Sync, IP Calculator Propagation, Tags Compactness, Role/Platform Options by Mode. All 5 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Platform toggle sync: Changing NIOS/UDDI/Hybrid in Quick Capture syncs to Site Sizing Recommendations
IP Calculator propagation: All 4 DC IPs (62,500) match IP Calculator value (25,000 KW × 2.5)
Tags are compact: Found 15 elements with text-[9px] class, 4 DC tags (blue), 3 Location tags (green)
Role options in NIOS mode: GM, GMC, DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP (5 options)
Role options in UDDI mode: DNS, DHCP, DNS/DHCP (3 options - no GM/GMC)
Platform options in NIOS mode: NIOS Physical, NIOS Virtual, NIOS HA Pair (3 options)
Platform options in UDDI mode: NIOS-X Virtual Server, NIOS-X as a Service (2 options)
Platform mode state shared via DiscoveryContext between Quick Capture and Sizing table
critical_code_review_comments: DiscoveryContext.jsx: platformMode state correctly shared between components via context
CustomerDetail.jsx Line 106: QuickCaptureBarInline uses platformMode and setPlatformMode from context
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Line 157-159: Uses platformMode and setPlatformMode from useDiscovery()
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 71-92: ROLE_OPTIONS_BY_MODE correctly defines different roles per platform mode
TokenCalculatorSummary.jsx Lines 53-69: PLATFORM_OPTIONS_BY_MODE correctly defines different platforms per mode
CustomerDetail.jsx Lines 229-260: DC sites use ipCalcValue for IPs (from IP Calculator)
DynamicIslandTag component uses text-[9px] for compact tag styling
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'Test' customer with 4 DCs (Atl-DC1, DAI-DC2, LA-DC3, test) and 3 Locations (Atlanta, LA, Texas)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform toggle sync, IP Calculator propagation, tags compactness, and role/platform options by mode all verified working. Platform mode is stored in shared DiscoveryContext. NIOS mode has GM/GMC roles and Physical/Virtual/HA platforms. UDDI mode has only DNS/DHCP roles and NXVS/NXaaS platforms.

platform_toggle_sync.details: platformMode state shared via DiscoveryContext between QuickCaptureBarInline and TokenCalculatorSummary

ip_calculator_propagation.details: IP Calculator value (25000 × 2.5 = 62500) correctly propagates to all DC IPs in Sizing table

tags_compact_uniform.details: Tags use text-[9px] class, px-1 py-px padding, flex-wrap layout. 4 DC tags (blue), 3 Location tags (green)
